# MrGuy Mobile Detail

> Professional mobile auto detailing in the Charlotte, NC metro area.
> We come to you. Premium detailing at your home, office, or anywhere.

## About

MrGuy Mobile Detail is a mobile auto detailing service based in Charlotte, NC.
We bring professional detailing directly to our customers — at their home, office,
or any location in the Charlotte metro area.

- Website: https://mrguymobiledetail.com
- Service Area: Charlotte, NC metro (Mecklenburg, Union, Cabarrus, Gaston counties)

## Services

### Exterior Detail
Full exterior wash, clay bar treatment, polish, and wax/sealant protection.
Includes wheels, tires, and trim restoration.

### Interior Detail
Deep interior cleaning including vacuuming, steam cleaning, leather conditioning,
dashboard and console detailing, and odor elimination.

### Full Detail (Interior + Exterior)
Complete inside and out detailing package. Our most popular service.

### Ceramic Coating
Professional ceramic coating application for long-lasting paint protection.
Includes paint correction and surface preparation.

## How It Works

1. Book online or call for an appointment
2. We come to your location (home, office, anywhere in Charlotte metro)
3. Professional detailing performed on-site
4. Pay with card (Stripe) or in-person (Square)

## Service Area

MrGuy Mobile Detail serves the greater Charlotte, NC metropolitan area including:
- Charlotte
- Matthews
- Mint Hill
- Indian Trail
- Huntersville
- Concord
- Gastonia
- Pineville
- Fort Mill (SC)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Do I need to be home during the detail?**
A: No. As long as we have access to the vehicle and a water source, we can complete the work while you're away.

**Q: How long does a full detail take?**
A: A full interior and exterior detail typically takes 2-4 hours depending on vehicle size and condition.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe (online) and Square (in-person). Cash is also accepted.

**Q: Do you bring your own water and supplies?**
A: We bring all supplies, tools, and products. We just need access to a water spigot at the location.

## Contact

- Website: https://mrguymobiledetail.com
- Book online at mrguymobiledetail.com

## Company

MrGuy Mobile Detail is a brand of Loving Art and Company LLC.
